zh.Llanidan, Anglesey, Wales: 威爾士安格萊布林斯金
zh.Llanllawddog, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威爾士卡馬特史爾利安拉勞多格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gronwy Ap Maredudd於1132年出生在英國威爾斯時，他的父親Maredudd Ap Iorwerth25歲，母親Angharad Verch Hywel18歲。他於從1170年到1198年與Adles Verch Gronwy Edynfed Gilman在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Llanidan, Anglesey, Wales: 威尔士安格萊布林斯金
zh-hans.Llanllawddog, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威尔士卡馬特史爾利安拉勞多格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gronwy Ap Maredudd于1132年出生在英国威尔斯时，他的父亲Maredudd Ap Iorwerth25岁，母亲Angharad Verch Hywel18岁。他于从1170年到1198年与Adles Verch Gronwy Edynfed Gilman在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation, borne in the Mabinogi by Goronwy the Staunch , Lord of Penllyn. He became the lover of the flower-maiden Blodeuedd and murdered her husband Lleu Llaw Gyffes , but Lleu was later restored to life and definitively dispatched Goronwy.

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Gronwy Ap Maredudd was born in 1132, in Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Maredudd Ap Iorwerth, was 25 and his mother, Angharad Verch Hywel, was 18. He married Adles Verch Gronwy Edynfed Gilman from 1170 to 1198, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gronwy Ap Maredudd est né en 1132, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Maredudd Ap Iorwerth, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Angharad Verch Hywel, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Adles Verch Gronwy Edynfed Gilman du 1170 au 1198, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gronwy Ap Maredudd 1132 in Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maredudd Ap Iorwerth 25 und seine Mutter Angharad Verch Hywel 18. Er hat von 1170 bis 1198 in Wales, United Kingdom Adles Verch Gronwy Edynfed Gilman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

ht.of Tyddyn Adda,Llanidan,Anglesey,Wales: Anglesey, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gronwy Ap Maredudd è nato il nel 1132 nel Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Maredudd Ap Iorwerth, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Angharad Verch Hywel, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Adles Verch Gronwy Edynfed Gilman da 1170 a 1198, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gronwy Ap Mareduddが1132年にイギリスウェールズで生まれた時，父Maredudd Ap Iorwerthは25歳，母Angharad Verch Hywelは18歳であった。から1170年まで1198年にイギリスウェールズでAdles Verch Gronwy Edynfed Gilmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Gronwy Ap Maredudd(이)가 1132년 영국 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maredudd Ap Iorwerth(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad Verch Hywel(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1170년 부터 1198년 까지 영국 웨일스에서 Adles Verch Gronwy Edynfed Gilman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

mg.of Tyddyn Adda,Llanidan,Anglesey,Wales: Anglesey, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

mn.of Tyddyn Adda,Llanidan,Anglesey,Wales: Angle's Eye, Уэльс, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gronwy Ap Maredudd nasceu em 1132, em Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Maredudd Ap Iorwerth, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Angharad Verch Hywel, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Adles Verch Gronwy Edynfed Gilman de 1170 a 1198, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gronwy Ap Maredudd родился в 1132 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Maredudd Ap Iorwerth было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad Verch Hywel, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Adles Verch Gronwy Edynfed Gilman с 1170 по 1198 в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.

sm.1170 to 1198: mai le 1170 e o'o I le 1198

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gronwy Ap Maredudd nació en 1132, en Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Maredudd Ap Iorwerth, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Angharad Verch Hywel, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Adles Verch Gronwy Edynfed Gilman desde 1170 hasta 1198, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
